home.heroSubtitle: Handcrafted leather goods & authentic Himalayan salt lamps — built for those who value the finest things.
home.storyP1: KAPTAN was born from a deep respect for craftsmanship and the natural world. Our journey began in the foothills of the Himalayas, where we discovered the warm, healing glow of authentic salt crystals.
home.storyP2: We partner with master leather artisans who have honed their craft for generations, using only the finest full-grain hides and traditional techniques. Every stitch tells a story of patience and precision.
home.storyP3: Our mission is simple: to bring you products that are not just beautiful, but built to last a lifetime.
home.newsletterSubtitle: Exclusive offers, new arrivals, and care tips delivered to your inbox.
home.t1Quote: The quality of my KAPTAN wallet is unlike anything I've owned. It feels like it will last forever.
home.t2Quote: The salt lamp creates the most calming atmosphere in my living room. Absolutely beautiful craftsmanship.
home.t3Quote: Fast shipping and the leather bag exceeded my expectations. The smell of real leather is intoxicating.

items.a: Most orders ship within 1–2 business days and arrive in 3–5 business days domestically, or 7–14 days internationally.
Yes — every lamp is hand-carved from salt mined directly at the Khewra mine in Pakistan, the world's second-largest salt mine.

items.q: How do I care for my leather?
items.a: Wipe with a soft, dry cloth. Condition every 3–6 months with a quality leather balm and keep away from prolonged sunlight.
Yes, we accept returns within 30 days of delivery for unused items in original condition. See our Returns page for details.

shipping.title: Shipping Info
shipping.p1: We ship worldwide from our workshop in Sialkot, Pakistan. Domestic orders arrive in 3–5 business days; international orders take 7–14 business days.
shipping.p2: Shipping is free on orders over €100. A tracking number is emailed once your order ships.
shipping.p3: Customs duties for international orders are the responsibility of the buyer.

returns.title: Returns
returns.p1: We accept returns within 30 days of delivery. Items must be unused, in original packaging, and accompanied by proof of purchase.
returns.p2: Refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5–7 business days of receiving the return.
returns.p3: Custom or engraved pieces are final sale and cannot be returned.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.p1: We collect only the information needed to fulfil your order — name, address, email, and payment details. We never sell your data.
privacy.p2: Payments are processed by trusted third-party providers using industry-standard encryption.
privacy.p3: You can request deletion of your account and data at any time by contacting us.

about.intro: KAPTAN is a tribute to mastery — bringing together the timeless art of Pakistani leatherwork and the natural beauty of authentic Himalayan salt, mined from the heart of the Khewra range.
about.leatherBody: Each piece is hand-stitched by master craftsmen in Sialkot — a city renowned for centuries-old leather traditions. We use full-grain, vegetable-tanned hides that age into one-of-a-kind patinas.
about.saltBody: Our salt lamps are sourced directly from Pakistan's Khewra mine — the world's second-largest salt mine. Every lamp is hand-carved, giving it a unique shape and warm glow.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Questions, custom orders, wholesale — we'd love to hear from you.
